subcodes.first_line: Now is the time to speak forth and to deliver speeches, the time to teach and to give testimony. Loosen thy tongue, expound the truths
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه مبلغه حال وقت نطق و بیانست و زمان تبلیغ و تبیان زبان بگشا و بیان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @The Holy Spirit, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
